description: Fallback literal notes when auto DISTINCT sampling misses a column. At runtime the API injects **LIVE DISTINCT VALUES** from the loaded file first — those always win over this file.

hints.note: Cite **Digital** vs **In-person** DNC columns separately. **Digital=Y** does not prove in-person is blocked — read the in-person flag for field visits.
Creditable may still be Y/N; IC_Credit is often Full not Yes — check DISTINCT on each column.
For **Reminder**-share or sequencing rules, treat **Access Reminder** as reminder-type unless the user excluded it — use DISTINCT then IN / LIKE covering both literals.
Severity/status strings vary (e.g. Moderate, Medium, Active). Run SELECT DISTINCT on the exact column before WHERE = '…'.
HCP targeting / priority flags often Y/N.
Normalize spacing vs schema; DISTINCT to see exact spellings.
Values like aligned / not aligned / misaligned — use DISTINCT; do not invent.

sqlite_math: For ratios and percentages use CAST(numerator AS REAL) / NULLIF(denominator,0) or 1.0 * numerator / denominator — never rely on integer division.
